title: Iran War Live Updates: Power Outages Are Reported in Tehran as Israel Launches Strikes
summary_full: Residents reported widespread power outages across the capital. Israel’s military said it had begun a new wave of airstrikes targeting infrastructure in the city, but did not provide further details.
